description_long: This is a medium-sized artificial Christmas tree with a classic conical shape and dense, layered green branches that mimic the look of a real evergreen. The branches are arranged in a symmetrical, tiered fashion, giving the tree a full and lush appearance from all sides. The trunk is a dark brown color, visible at the base, and the tree tapers to a pointed tip at the top. There are no visible decorative ornaments, string lights, or artificial snow on the branches, and the tree stands alone without any gifts or additional embellishments. The surface of the branches appears to be made of synthetic plastic or PVC, giving them a slightly matte and semi-soft texture. This tree is suitable for placement in urban public spaces, parks, or sidewalks as a festive seasonal decoration.
description: A lush, artificial green Christmas tree with tiered branches and a pointed top, free of ornaments or lights. The tree has a realistic, full appearance and stands alone without decorations.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from the front, showing its symmetrical, conical shape and dense green branches with a visible pointed top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side of the tree, revealing the layered structure of the branches and the fullness of the foliage.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed from the back, displaying the even distribution of branches and the dark trunk at the base.
description_view_3: The right side of the tree is visible, emphasizing the consistent density and arrangement of the green branches.
